text: {"claims":[{"statement":"An eight-week trial in 42 adults aged 65 to 75 found that the supervised balance program reduced falls during the eight-week follow-up.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"An eight-week trial in 42 adults aged 65 to 75 found that the supervised balance program reduced falls during the eight-week follow-up.","entailment":"The quoted sentence reports the trial’s result that the supervised balance program led to fewer falls over the eight‑week follow‑up, directly supporting the claim of a reduction in falls.","population":"42 adults aged 65 to 75","intervention":"supervised balance program","comparator":"","outcome":"reduced falls","timeframe":"eight-week follow-up","quantifiers":"eight-week trial","modality":"causal"},{"statement":"The article concludes that the program prevents falls permanently for everyone of every age.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The article concludes that the program prevents falls permanently for everyone of every age.","entailment":"The quoted sentence states the article’s conclusion that the program will permanently prevent falls for all ages, which underlies the claim of lifelong universal fall prevention.","population":"everyone of every age","intervention":"the program","comparator":"","outcome":"prevents falls permanently","timeframe":"forever","quantifiers":"","modality":"causal"}]}
